milestone_note: Public beta begins ("Better Than Nothing Beta")
V1.5 satellites with laser inter-satellite links rolling out
V2 Mini satellites launching on Falcon 9
Most recent tracked count; ~59% of all active satellites in orbit
Prototype satellites KuiperSat-1 and KuiperSat-2 launched (Atlas V)
Third production launch (Falcon 9 debut for Kuiper)
FCC approves Gen2 expansion of 4500 additional satellites
Rebrand from Project Kuiper to Amazon Leo completed
LA-06 mission; still well behind FCC pace of 1618 required by 2026-07-30
Third-largest satellite constellation in orbit (behind Starlink and OneWeb)
Most recent tracked estimate; deadline extension requested from FCC
